data.body:
Epic 850f fleshed out + PASS plan-review, moved to in_progress. Created 3 children under it (all PASS plan-review, signed attestations):
- S1 2ee4 avid-tile-beard: ADR + sibling IaC epic (docs-only)
- S2 40b8 tank-bugle-braid: T2 seam (semantic.py + config + oracle escalation, default-off)
- S3 8451 fun-peer-bleat: pyright backend + grounding-t2 extra + fail-open matrix
Stack deps: S1 <- S2 <- S3 (depends_on). Key design locked from review: minimal seam (no plugin registry, Rule-of-Three), refute_semantic dispatch fn, caller-owned cache param, escalation in oracle.refute_absence only (T1 lane untouched), span-match by file+rule-kind+leaf-name (validate_reference has no line/span). Reviews must run SEQUENTIALLY (parallel -> 429). Now claiming S1.
